channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Sunday, May 3, 2026
item.description: This Sunday is quieter on breaking news, but the threads that matter for your work are real: Canada's tightening visa policy is reshaping international enrolment in ways that open consulting doors at universities now scrambling to rebuild domestic recruitment pipelines — the Univ...
